backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as a placeholder backend with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that the Hero section tagline was updated to deep black (#111111) using the Playfair Display serif font, with high confidence tied to Hero.tsx.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document providing one-to-two sentence summaries of each frontend source file for quick project orientation.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including backgrounds, borders, charts, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app, setting the page title to 'Elite Properties Real Estate Consultant' and mounting the app at the #root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes Navbar, Hero, About, Services, Contact, and Footer into a single-page layout.
frontend/src/components/About.tsx: 'Why Choose Us' section featuring a 4-column stats bar, 6 highlight cards with gold icon badges, and gold/charcoal luxury styling on a dark background.
frontend/src/components/Contact.tsx: Contact section with address, hours, and phone info cards on a dark charcoal background, plus a prominent WhatsApp enquiry panel with gold gradient styling.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Multi-column footer with dark charcoal background, gold accents, bilingual business name, full contact info, quick links, WhatsApp CTA, and copyright.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-width hero section with a background image, bilingual business name, a trust badge tagline rendered in deep black (#111111) with Playfair Display font, stats row, and WhatsApp/Call CTA buttons.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Responsive fixed navbar for Elite Properties with a custom SVG logo, smooth-scroll navigation links, a phone CTA, and a mobile hamburger menu that changes appearance on scroll.
frontend/src/components/Services.tsx: Displays a grid of 20 real estate service cards (icons + titles + descriptions) for Elite Properties, covering buying, rentals, loans, luxury properties, and more.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder module with no exports, indicating no backend queries are needed for this static informational website.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Google Fonts and Tailwind, defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for gold and charcoal color tokens, dark mode variants, typography, scrollbar styling, and utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider into the DOM root.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with OKLCH-based gold and charcoal color palettes, custom fonts (Playfair Display, Inter), box shadows, border radii, and animation keyframes, plus typography and container-queries plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks project state (version 7) for a yellow-themed single-page real estate website for Elite Properties, Pune, including architectural notes, known issues, and a list of existing features with requirements.
